mapper.select: WITH ItemHierarchy AS ( SELECT ST1.FromItemID AS ParentItemID, ST1.ToItemID AS ItemID, ST1.SortNum, 1 AS getCxnItemList_gridList FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST1 WHERE ST1.ToItemID = #{s_itemID} AND ST1.CategoryCode IN ('ST1', 'ST2') AND ST1.Deleted != '1' UNION ALL SELECT IH.ItemID AS ParentItemID, ST1.ToItemID AS ItemID, ST1.SortNum, IH.getCxnItemList_gridList + 1 AS getCxnItemList_gridList FROM ItemHierarchy IH JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST1 ON ST1.FromItemID = IH.ItemID WHERE ST1.CategoryCode IN ('ST1', 'ST2') AND ST1.Deleted != '1' ), RankedData AS ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (PARTITION BY Item.Identifier ORDER BY Item.Identifier ASC) AS RNUM, Item.Identifier, Dic.Name AS ClassName, Dic.TypeCode AS ClassCode, Item.ItemID, [AT00001] AS Activity, [ZAT02003] AS ApplicationCategory, [ZAT02004] AS Period, [AT00015] AS Input, [ZAT02005] AS Responsible_Input, [AT00016] AS Output, [ZAT02006] AS Responsible_Output FROM ( SELECT ItemID, AttrTypeCode, PlainText FROM [XBOLTADM].[TB_ITEM_ATTR] WHERE LanguageID = #{languageID} ) AS SourceTable PIVOT ( MAX(PlainText) FOR AttrTypeCode IN ([ZAT02003], [ZAT02004], [ZAT02005], [ZAT02006], [AT00001], [AT00015], [AT00016]) ) AS ItemAttr JOIN [XBOLTADM].[TB_ITEM] AS Item ON ItemAttr.ItemID = Item.ItemID LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIC ON Item.ClassCode = TIC.ItemClassCode LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY DIC ON Item.ClassCode = DIC.TypeCode AND Dic.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE Item.Identifier NOT LIKE '$%' ), FilteredData AS ( SELECT RNUM, Identifier, ClassName, ClassCode, ItemID, Activity, ApplicationCategory, Period, Input, Responsible_Input, Output, Responsible_Output FROM RankedData WHERE RNUM = 1 ), ProcessCXN AS ( SELECT STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0114' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS prc_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0114' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS prc_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214A' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS r_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214A' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS r_ItemID, STRING_AGG( CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214B' THEN CASE WHEN TATL2.Value IS NOT NULL AND TATL2.Value != '' THEN ITATR.PlainText + ' (' + TATL2.Value + ')' ELSE ITATR.PlainText END END, '$$ ' ) AS a_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214B' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS a_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214C' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS s_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214C' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS s_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214D' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS i_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214D' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS i_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214E' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS c_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0214E' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS c_ItemID, (SELECT STRING_AGG(Identifier, '$$ ') FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID in (SELECT FromItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ToItemID = ITEM.ToItemID AND ClassCode = 'CNL1414' AND Deleted != '1' )) AS pre_Identifier, (SELECT STRING_AGG(FromItemID, '$$ ') FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ToItemID = ITEM.ToItemID AND ClassCode = 'CNL1414' AND Deleted != '1' ) AS pre_ItemID, (SELECT STRING_AGG(Identifier, '$$ ') FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID in (SELECT ToItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE FromItemID = ITEM.ToItemID AND ClassCode = 'CNL1414' AND Deleted != '1' )) AS later_Identifier, (SELECT STRING_AGG(ToItemID, '$$ ') FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE FromItemID = ITEM.ToItemID AND ClassCode = 'CNL1414' AND Deleted != '1' ) AS later_ItemID, ITEM.ToItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITEM LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR ON ITEM.FromItemID = ITATR.ItemID AND ITATR.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ITATR.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR2 ON ITEM.ItemID = ITATR2.ItemID AND ITATR2.LanguageID = '1042' AND ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT02028' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL2 ON ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = TATL2.AttrTypeCode AND ITATR2.PlainText = TATL2.LovCode AND ITATR2.LanguageID = TATL2.LanguageID GROUP BY ITEM.ToItemID ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IH.getCxnItemList_gridList ASC, IH.SortNum ASC, FD.ClassCode ASC, FD.Identifier ASC) AS NewRNUM, ISNULL(IH.ParentItemID, '') as ParentItemID, ISNULL(IH.ItemID, '') as ItemID, ISNULL(FD.Identifier, '') as Identifier, ISNULL(FD.ClassName, '') as ClassName, ISNULL(FD.ClassCode, '') as ClassCode, ISNULL(FD.Activity, '') as Activity, ISNULL(FD.ApplicationCategory, '') as ApplicationCategory, ISNULL(FD.Period, '') as Period, ISNULL(FD.Input, '') as Input, ISNULL(FD.Responsible_Input, '') as Responsible_Input, ISNULL(FD.Output, '') as Output, ISNULL(FD.Responsible_Output, '') as Responsible_Output, ISNULL(P_CXN.prc_text, '') as prc_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.prc_ItemID, '') as prc_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.r_text, '') as r_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.r_ItemID, '') as r_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.a_text, '') as a_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.a_ItemID, '') as a_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.s_text, '') as s_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.s_ItemID, '') as s_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.i_text, '') as i_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.i_ItemID, '') as i_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.c_text, '') as c_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.c_ItemID, '') as c_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.pre_Identifier, '') as pre_Identifier, ISNULL(P_CXN.pre_ItemID, '') as pre_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.later_Identifier, '') as later_Identifier, ISNULL(P_CXN.later_ItemID, '') as later_ItemID FROM ItemHierarchy IH LEFT JOIN FilteredData FD ON IH.ItemID = FD.ItemID LEFT JOIN ProcessCXN P_CXN ON IH.ItemID = P_CXN.ToItemID ORDER BY IH.getCxnItemList_gridList ASC, IH.SortNum ASC, FD.Identifier ASC, FD.ClassCode ASC;

SELECT CXN_RNR.r_text AS r_text, CXN_RNR.r_ItemID AS r_ItemID, CXN_RNR.a_text AS a_text, CXN_RNR.a_ItemID AS a_ItemID, CXN_RNR.s_text AS s_text, CXN_RNR.s_ItemID AS s_ItemID, CXN_RNR.i_text AS i_text, CXN_RNR.i_ItemID AS i_ItemID, CXN_RNR.c_text AS c_text, CXN_RNR.c_ItemID AS c_ItemID, Item.Identifier, Dic.Name AS ClassName, Dic.TypeCode AS ClassCode, Item.ItemID, ItemAttr.[AT00001] AS Activity, ItemAttr.[AT00003] AS Outline, ItemAttr.[AT00015] AS Input, ItemAttr.[AT00016] AS Output, ItemAttr.[ZAT02015] AS PerformanceSystem FROM ( SELECT ITEM.ToItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201A' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS r_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201A' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS r_ItemID, STRING_AGG( CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201B' THEN CASE WHEN TATL2.Value IS NOT NULL AND TATL2.Value != '' THEN ITATR.PlainText + ' (' + TATL2.Value + ')' ELSE ITATR.PlainText END END, '$$ ' ) AS a_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201B' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS a_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201C' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS s_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201C' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS s_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201D' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS i_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201D' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS i_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201E' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS c_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201E' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS c_ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITEM LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR ON ITEM.FromItemID = ITATR.ItemID AND ITATR.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ITATR.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR2 ON ITEM.ItemID = ITATR2.ItemID AND ITATR2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT02028' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL2 ON ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = TATL2.AttrTypeCode AND ITATR2.PlainText = TATL2.LovCode AND ITATR2.LanguageID = TATL2.LanguageID WHERE ITEM.ToItemID = #{s_itemID} GROUP BY ITEM.ToItemID ) AS CXN_RNR LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITEM ON CXN_RNR.ToItemID = ITEM.ItemID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ItemID, MAX(CASE WHEN AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' THEN PlainText END) AS [AT00001], MAX(CASE WHEN AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' THEN PlainText END) AS [AT00003], MAX(CASE WHEN AttrTypeCode = 'AT00015' THEN PlainText END) AS [AT00015], MAX(CASE WHEN AttrTypeCode = 'AT00016' THEN PlainText END) AS [AT00016], MAX(CASE WHEN AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT02015' THEN PlainText END) AS [ZAT02015] FROM [XBOLTADM].[TB_ITEM_ATTR] WHERE LanguageID = #{languageID} GROUP BY ItemID ) AS ItemAttr ON ITEM.ItemID = ItemAttr.ItemID LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIC ON ITEM.ClassCode = TIC.ItemClassCode LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY DIC ON ITEM.ClassCode = DIC.TypeCode AND Dic.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE ITEM.Identifier NOT LIKE '$%' AND ITEM.ItemID = #{s_itemID}

SELECT RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(Identifier, 3) AS INT)), 0) + 1 AS VARCHAR(4)), 3) AS nextNum FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE 1 =1 AND ClassCode = #{ClassCode} AND IDENTIFIER IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(IDENTIFIER) != '' AND LEN(IDENTIFIER) >= 4 AND Deleted != 1 AND SUBSTRING(IDENTIFIER, 1, LEN(IDENTIFIER) - 4) =#{docIdentifier};
SELECT XBOLTADM.fn_createItemIdentifier(#{ItemID},#{ClassCode},#{languageID})AS docInfo;

SELECT Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY TI.ClassCode ASC, TOT.Name ,TIA.PlainText ASC ) as RNUM --,CS.CompletionDT , TI.ItemID AS s_itemID , TI.ItemID AS ItemID , TI.ClassCode , ISNULL(TIT.Icon, 'img_job.png') ItemTypeImg , ISNULL(TIT.Icon, 'img_job.png') Icon , TIT.ItemTypeCode, TIF.ItemID, TIF.CategoryCode, ISNULL(TIS.SCOUNT, 0) AS SCOUNT , TIFA.PlainText as ParentName , TIFA.ItemID as ParentID , TIA.PlainText as ItemName , TI.ItemID AS id , TI.ClassCode AS parent , ISNULL(TI.Identifier,'') + ' ' + ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS TreeName , TD.Name as ClassName, TTD.Name as TypeName, ISNULL(TT.Name, '') as TeamName , TOT.Name as OwnerTeamName , ISNULL(TM.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End AS Name , TM.MemberID AS AuthorID, Convert(nvarchar(20),TI.LastUpdated, 111) AS LastUpdated, TI.Version, TI.Identifier , ISNULL(TIFA2.PlainText, '') as ProcessInfo , ISNULL(TIFA3.PlainText, '') AS DocLev ,ISNULL(ATLOV1.Value, ISNULL(TIFA3.PlainText, '')) AS DocLevValue , ISNULL(TIFA4.PlainText, '') AS DocType ,ISNULL(ATLOV2.Value, ISNULL(TIFA4.PlainText, '')) AS DocTypeValue , ISNULL(XBOLTADM.fn_GetMyAbsPath(TI.ItemID, #{languageID}), '') AS path , 0 AS CHK , TSD.Name AS StatusName , TI.Status AS Status , CXN.ItemID AS CXNItemID , CXN.ItemTypeCode AS CXNItemTypeCode , CXN.ClassCode AS CXNClassCode , CXNCLS.Name AS CXNClassName , CXNCLS.Name AS LinkType , TI.OwnerTeamID , ( SELECT Count(*) FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID in (Select Distinct ItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID in (Select FromItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ToItemID = #{s_itemID} AND CategoryCode = 'CN' AND Deleted != '1') OR ItemID in (Select ToItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE FromItemID = #{s_itemID} AND CategoryCode = 'CN' AND Deleted != '1') ) And ClassCode = TI.ClassCode ) AS ClassCNT , TTT.Name AS AuthorTeamName , Replace(REPLACE( replace(replace(ISNULL(TIA56.PlainText,''), char(13),''),char(10),'
') ,'<','<'), '>','>') AS KoreanText FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI Left outer join ( SELECT FromItemID, ISNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT ToItemID), 0) AS SCOUNT FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Deleted != '1' GROUP BY FromItemID ) TIS on TIS.FromItemID = TI.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TIF on TI.ItemID = TIF.ToItemID AND TIF.CategoryCode = 'ST1' Left Outer JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIT ON TI.ClassCode = TIT.ItemClassCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIFA on TIF.FromItemID = TIFA.ItemID AND TIFA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TIFA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD on TI.ClassCode = TD.TypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TTD on TI.ItemTypeCode = TTD.TypeCode AND TTD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TSD on TI.Status = TSD.TypeCode AND TSD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TSD.Category = 'ITMSTS' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TT on TI.CompanyID = TT.TeamID AND TT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TOT on TI.OwnerTeamID = TOT.TeamID AND TOT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM on TI.AuthorID = TM.MemberID Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA on TI.ItemID = TIA.ItemID AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TIA.LanguageID = #{defaultLang} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIFA2 on TI.ItemID = TIFA2.ItemID AND TIFA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' AND TIFA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIFA3 on TI.ItemID = TIFA3.ItemID AND TIFA3.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT01020' AND TIFA3.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIFA4 on TI.ItemID = TIFA4.ItemID AND TIFA4.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT01060' AND TIFA4.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV ATLOV1 on ATLOV1.LovCode = TIFA3.LovCode AND ATLOV1.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV ATLOV2 on ATLOV2.LovCode = TIFA4.LovCode AND ATLOV2.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM CXN ON (CXN.FromItemID = TI.ItemID OR CXN.ToItemID = TI.ItemID) And (CXN.FromItemID = #{s_itemID} OR CXN.ToItemID = #{s_itemID}) And CXN.Deleted != 1 And CXN.CategoryCode = 'CN' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY CXNCLS on CXN.ClassCode = CXNCLS.TypeCode AND CXNCLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT on TM.TeamID = TTT.TeamID AND TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_PATH_TXT TIPT ON TIPT.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIPT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA56 ON TIA56.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA56.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00056' And TIA56.LanguageID = #{defaultLang} WHERE TI.ItemID in ( Select Distinct TI.ItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI WHERE TI.ItemID in ( Select FromItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ToItemID = #{s_itemID} AND CategoryCode = 'CN' AND Deleted != '1' ) OR TI.ItemID in ( Select ToItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE FromItemID = #{s_itemID} AND CategoryCode = 'CN' AND Deleted != '1' ) ) AND TI.ClassCode = #{ClassCode} AND TI.ItemTypeCode = #{ItemTypeCode} AND TI.CompanyID = #{CompanyCode} AND ItemTypeCode IN ${item} AND TI.ClassCode IN ${item} AND TI.CategoryCode != 'TOJ' And CXN.ItemTypeCode IN (${cxnTypeList}) And CXN.ClassCode NOT IN (${notInCxnClsList}) And TIFA3.PlainText = #{DocLev} order by RNUM

SELECT * FROM( SELECT TOP 1000 Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY TI.Identifier, TCS.ChangeSetID DESC) as RNUM , 0 AS CHK , TCS.ChangeSetID , TCS.Version , TCS.ProjectID , TI.Identifier AS CODE , TIA.PlainText AS Subject , TCS.ItemID , TCS.Description , TM.Name + Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End AS AuthorName , ISNULL(CONVERT(char(10),TCS.CreationTime, 120),'') as CreationTime , ISNULL(CONVERT(char(10),TCS.CompletionDT, 120),'') as CompletionDT , TDS.Name AS StatusName , TMN.URL , TDIC.Name AS ClassName , TPT.Name AS ProjectName , XBOLTADM.fn_GetMyAbsPathForProject(TP.ProjectID, #{languageID}) AS Path FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI on TCS.ItemID = TI.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA on TCS.ItemID = TIA.ItemID AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM on TCS.AuthorID = TM.MemberID Left outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDS on TCS.Status = TDS.TypeCode AND TDS.Category = 'CNGSTS' AND TDS.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_OLM_DOC_CATEGORY TODC on TODC.DocCategoryCode = 'CS' Left outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MENU TMN on TODC.WFDocMenuID = TMN.MenuID Left outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDIC on TCS.ItemClassCode = TDIC.TypeCode AND TDIC.Category = 'CLS' AND TDIC.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP on TCS.ProjectID = TP.ProjectID Left outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT_TXT TPT on TP.ProjectID = TPT.ProjectID AND TPT.LanguageID = #{languageID} where TCS.Status IN (${status})
AND TCS.ChangeSetID IN (${changeSetID})
AND TCS.WFInstanceID = #{wfInstanceID}
AND TCS.ChangeSetID NOT IN (${noViewIDs})
)TC
TC.RNUM BETWEEN ((#{pageNo}-1)*#{LIST_PAGE_SCALE} + 1) AND (#{pageNo}*#{LIST_PAGE_SCALE})
order by CHK DESC, RNUM

SELECT Top 1000 Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY Identifier, ClassCode) as RNUM , 0 AS CHK , ItemTypeImg , ItemID, Path, ItemName, ClassName, ClassCode, TeamName , OwnerTeamName, Name, LastUpdated,Version, Identifier , StatusName , 'btn_import_small.gif' As Report , CreationTime , ItemTypeCode , DocLev , DocLevValue , DocType , DocTypeValue , KoreanText FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TI.ItemID , ISNULL(TIT.Icon, 'img_job.png') ItemTypeImg , ISNULL(TIPT.Path, XBOLTADM.fn_GetMyAbsPathForList( TI.ItemID ,#{languageID})) AS Path , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') as ItemName , TD.Name as ClassName, TI.ClassCode , ISNULL(TT.Name, '') as TeamName , TOT.Name as OwnerTeamName , TM.Name, TI.Version, TI.Identifier , TSD.Name AS StatusName , Convert(nvarchar(20),TI.LastUpdated, 111) AS LastUpdated , Convert(nvarchar(20),TI.CreationTime, 111) AS CreationTime , TI.ItemTypeCode , ISNULL(TIFA3.PlainText, '') AS DocLev ,ISNULL(ATLOV1.Value, ISNULL(TIFA3.PlainText, '')) AS DocLevValue , ISNULL(TIFA4.PlainText, '') AS DocType ,ISNULL(ATLOV2.Value, ISNULL(TIFA4.PlainText, '')) AS DocTypeValue , Replace(REPLACE( replace(replace(ISNULL(TIA56.PlainText,''), char(13),''),char(10),'
') ,'<','<'), '>','>') AS KoreanText FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI Left Outer JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_TYPE TIT ON TI.ItemTypeCode = TIT.ItemTypeCode Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD on TI.ClassCode = TD.TypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TSD on TI.Status = TSD.TypeCode AND TSD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TSD.Category = 'ITMSTS' Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TT on TI.CompanyID = TT.TeamID AND TT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TOT on TI.OwnerTeamID = TOT.TeamID AND TOT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM on TI.AuthorID = TM.MemberID Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA on TI.ItemID = TIA.ItemID AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_PATH_TXT TIPT ON TIPT.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIPT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIFA3 on TI.ItemID = TIFA3.ItemID AND TIFA3.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT01020' AND TIFA3.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIFA4 on TI.ItemID = TIFA4.ItemID AND TIFA4.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT01060' AND TIFA4.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV ATLOV1 on ATLOV1.LovCode = TIFA3.LovCode AND ATLOV1.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT01020' AND ATLOV1.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV ATLOV2 on ATLOV2.LovCode = TIFA4.LovCode AND ATLOV2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT01060' AND ATLOV2.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM TID ON TI.ItemID = TID.ItemID Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA56 ON TIA56.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TIA56.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00056' AND TIA56.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE TI.Deleted != 1 AND TI.ItemID IN (Select Distinct ToItemID from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM where CategoryCode = 'ST1') AND TI.ItemID != #{itemID} AND TI.ItemID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR WHERE LovCode = #{lovCode} AND AttrTypeCode = #{attrTypeCode} AND LanguageID = #{languageID} ) AND (TI.ItemID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR WHERE PlainText like '%'+#{baseCondition1}+'%' AND AttrTypeCode = #{AttrCodeBase1} AND LanguageID = #{languageID} ) OR TIA56.PlainText like '%'+#{koreanText}+'%' ) AND TI.ItemID IN ( SELECT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier like '%'+#{baseCondition2}+'%'ESCAPE'!' Identifier like '%'+#{baseCondition2}+'%' ) AND TI.ItemID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ITATR.ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR LEFT OUTER JOIN xboltadm.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV ATLV ON ATLV.LovCode = ITATR.LovCode and ITATR.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE ATLV.LovCode = #{docType} ) AND TI.CategoryCode = #{CategoryCode} AND TI.ClassCode = #{ClassCode} AND TI.ClassCode IN (${ClassCodes}) AND TI.ItemTypeCode = #{ItemTypeCode} AND TI.ItemID IN (${childItems}) AND TI.ItemID IN ('') AND TI.ItemID NOT IN (${masterItemId}) AND TID.DimValueID = #{DimValueID} AND TID.DimTypeID = #{DimTypeID} AND TI.CompanyID = #{CompanyID} AND TOT.Name like '%'+#{OwnerTeam}+'%'ESCAPE'!' AND TOT.Name like '%'+#{OwnerTeam}+'%' AND TM.Name like '%'+#{Name}+'%'ESCAPE'!' AND TM.Name like '%'+#{Name}+'%' AND TI.Status = #{Status} AND TI.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND TI.Identifier != '' AND TI.DefSymCode = #{DefSymCode} AND CONVERT(nvarchar(20), TI.CreationTime, 112) BETWEEN #{scStartDt1} AND #{scEndDt1} AND CONVERT(nvarchar(20), TI.LastUpdated, 112) BETWEEN #{scStartDt2} AND #{scEndDt2} AND TI.ItemID IN ( SELECT distinct ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR WHERE AttrTypeCode = #{AttrCode} AND LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ClassCode = #{ClassCode} AND ItemID IN(${childItems}) AND ItemID IN ('') ) AND TI.ItemID NOT IN ( SELECT distinct ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR WHERE AttrTypeCode = #{AttrCode} AND LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ClassCode = #{ClassCode} AND ItemID IN (${childItems}) AND ItemID IN ('') ) AND TIA56.PlainText like '%'+#{koreanText}+'%' ) A 1=1 AND A.RNUM BETWEEN ((#{pageNo}-1)*#{LIST_PAGE_SCALE} + 1) AND (#{pageNo}*#{LIST_PAGE_SCALE}) AND ItemID NOT IN (select ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE DimTypeID = #{DimTypeID}) Order By Identifier, ClassCode

SELECT ITEM.ToItemID AS itemID,
STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201A' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS r_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201A' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS r_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201A' THEN ITEM.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS r_CxnItemID, STRING_AGG( CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201B' THEN CASE WHEN TATL2.Value IS NOT NULL AND TATL2.Value != '' THEN ITATR.PlainText + ' (' + TATL2.Value + ')' ELSE ITATR.PlainText END END, '$$ ' ) AS a_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201B' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS a_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201B' THEN ITEM.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS a_CxnItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201C' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS s_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201C' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS s_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201C' THEN ITEM.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS s_CxnItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201D' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS i_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201D' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS i_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201D' THEN ITEM.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS i_CxnItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201E' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS c_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201E' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS c_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201E' THEN ITEM.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS c_CxnItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITEM LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR ON ITEM.FromItemID = ITATR.ItemID AND ITATR.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ITATR.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR2 ON ITEM.ItemID = ITATR2.ItemID AND ITATR2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT02028' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL2 ON ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = TATL2.AttrTypeCode AND ITATR2.PlainText = TATL2.LovCode AND ITATR2.LanguageID = TATL2.LanguageID WHERE ITEM.ToItemID = #{s_itemID} AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' GROUP BY ITEM.ToItemID
SELECT DocumentID as itemId, FileName as fileName, FileRealName as fileRealName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE WHERE DocumentID = #{itemID}
SELECT * FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE 1 =1 AND DocNo = #{docNo} AND Identifier LIKE #{identifier}%
mapper.delete: SELECT ItemID as itemId, CurChangeSet as curChangeSet, Identifier as identifier, Version as version FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGESET WHERE 1 =1 AND ItemID = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT I.ItemID as itemId, I.Identifier as identifier, I.ProjectID as projectId, CS.Version as version, I.CurChangeSet as curChangeSet FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM I INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET AS CS ON CS.ChangeSetID = I.CurChangeSet WHERE I.ItemID = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: Insert Into XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV( ChangeSetID, Seq, ItemID, AttrTypeCode, LanguageID, ModelID, PlainText, HtmlText, LovCode, ItemTypeCode, ClassCode, Deleted, Font, FontFamily, FontStyle, FontSize, FontColor, LastUpdated ) Values( #{changeSetID}, #{seq}, #{itemID}, #{attrTypeCode}, #{languageID}, #{modelID}, #{plainText}, #{htmlText}, #{lovCode}, #{itemTypeCode}, #{classCode}, #{deleted}, #{font}, #{fontFamily}, #{fontStyle}, #{fontSize}, #{fontColor}, Getdate() )
INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_IF ( ItemID, DocumentNo, Version, Identifier ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{docNo}, #{revNo}, #{identifier} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT(ItemID) as itemId FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_IF WHERE DocumentNo = #{docNo} AND Identifier LIKE #{identifier} + '%'
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(LogID)+1, 1) as logId FROM XBOLTADM.TB_OLM_API_LOG
SELECT ReportCode, BatchName, SenderAcc, SenderName, SenderPwd, EmailSvrDomain, Subject, Body, Receiver FROM XBOLTADM.SEND_BATCH_MAIL

SELECT TD.Name AS MENU_NM, CASE WHEN TA.Deactivated = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS USE_YN, ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TA.CreationTime, 112),'20250428') AS REG_DT FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ARC TA LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TA.ArcCode = TD.TypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE TA.Deactivated = 0

SELECT TM.EmployeeNum AS EMPLOYEE_NUM, CASE WHEN TM.Active = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS USE_YN, CASE WHEN MAX(TVL.Time) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(TM.RegDate, '20250428') ELSE MAX(TVL.Time) END AS LAST_EVENT_DT FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_VISIT_LOG TVL ON TM.MemberID = TVL.MemberID WHERE TM.Active = 1 AND LEFT(TM.EmployeeNum,2) IN ('oa','op','so','og','SG','OY','PY','SY') GROUP BY TM.EmployeeNum, TM.Active, TM.RegDate

SELECT TM.EmployeeNum AS EMPLOYEE_NUM, TM.Name AS NAME, CASE WHEN LEN(TXT.Name) > 50 THEN LEFT(TXT.Name, 47) + '...' ELSE TXT.Name END AS DEPARTMENT, TVL.Time AS LOGIN_DT FROM XBOLTADM.TB_VISIT_LOG TVL INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = TVL.MemberID INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT ON TT.TeamID = TM.TeamID INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TXT ON TXT.TeamID = TT.TeamID AND TXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TVL.Time, 112) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()), 112) AND TVL.ActionType = 'LOGIN' AND LEFT(TM.EmployeeNum,2) IN ('oa','op','so','og','SG','OY','PY','SY')

SELECT TM.EmployeeNum AS REGID, ISNULL(TD.Name,TD2.Name) AS MENUNM, TVL.MenuID AS MENUID, TVL.Time AS REG_DT FROM XBOLTADM.TB_VISIT_LOG TVL LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = TVL.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = TVL.MenuID AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 ON TD2.TypeCode = TVL.MenuID AND TD2.LanguageID = 1033 WHERE CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TVL.Time, 112) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()), 112) AND TVL.ActionType IS NOT NULL AND TVL.ActionType IN ('TMPLMN','ARCMN') AND TVL.MenuID IS NOT NULL AND TVL.MenuID NOT IN ('MN023','MN001','MN113') AND LEFT(TM.EmployeeNum,2) IN ('oa','op','so','og','SG','OY','PY','SY')
